revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from acronym
  |name=From an acronym
  |from=an [[acronym]]
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA".
** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD".
  |main category=Redirects from acronyms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from acronym
  |name=From an acronym
  |from=an [[acronym]]
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA".
** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD".
  |main category=Redirects from acronyms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from acronym
  |name=From an acronym
  |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]]
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA".
** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD".
  |main category=Redirects from acronyms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from acronym
  |name=From an acronym
  |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]]
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA".
** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD".
  |main category=Redirects from acronyms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from acronym |name=From an acronym |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]] |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA". ** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD". |main category=Redirects from acronyms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from acronym
  |name=From an acronym
  |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]]
  |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}}
  |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA".
** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD".
  |main category=Redirects from acronyms
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from acronym |name=From an acronym |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]] |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA". ** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD". |main category=Redirects from acronyms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from acronym |name=From an acronym |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]] |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA". ** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD". |main category=Redirects from acronyms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from acronym |name=From an acronym |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]] |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA". ** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD". |main category=Redirects from acronyms }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from acronym |name=From an acronym |from=an [[:en:Acronym|Acronym]] |to=a related topic, such as the expansion of the acronym{{#if:{{{of|{{{for|}}}}}}|<nowiki />; the expanded form is "{{{of|{{{for}}}}}}"}} |info=** Remember that an acronym is a special type of [[:en:Initialism|Initialism]] that can be spoken as a word, such as "NATO" or "radar" or "ANOVA". ** Use {{tl|R from initialism}} for abbreviations that have letters that are pronounced separately, such as "OAU" or "USSR" or "DoD". |main category=Redirects from acronyms }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
